svg.title: PAI Platform Revised Flowchart — Email first, then role selection, free idea registration, then paid listing
svg.desc: Revised dual-lane PAI flowchart: email verification → role selection → free idea registration → paid subscription for listing → investor journey to deal closure.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does PAI email sign up work?')
sendPrompt('How does OTP email verification work on PAI?')
sendPrompt('What compliance terms must a Pitcher accept on PAI?')
sendPrompt('What compliance terms must a Fetcher accept on PAI?')
sendPrompt('What details does a Pitcher fill in their profile on PAI?')
sendPrompt('What details does a Fetcher fill in their profile on PAI?')
sendPrompt('How does free idea registration and IP protection work on PAI?')
g.text: No cost to protect your idea
